item.title: LEGO DOTS Big Box 41960 Arts and Crafts Set for Kids Aged 6 Plus DIY Desk Tidy Organizer or Toy Jewelry Storage Tray Decoration Creative Activity
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DOTS Big Box 41960 Arts and Crafts Set for Kids Aged 6 Plus DIY Desk Tidy Organizer or Toy Jewelry Storage Tray Decoration Creative Activity here: ℹ️: Arts-and-crafts treat for ages 6+ – Any creative DIY fan will love this customizable Set. The storage box, removable lid and colorful tiles will make a fun gift for kids with a passion for crafts Make it, design it, use it – Surprise any kid or arts-and-crafts fan with this LEGO DOTS Big Box (41960) craft Set.
